name: Tofu Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add garlic and onion; sauté until fragrant, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in carrot, pepper, basil, fennel, and oregano; cook for an additional 10 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
4. In a large bowl, beat eggs. Gradually add the remaining ingredients except tofu, stirring to combine.
5. Crumble the tofu into small pieces and fold into the mixture; mix well to ensure even distribution of tofu.
6. Form the mixture into 1 1/2-inch balls and place them on a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake for 20-30 minutes at 350°F, or until golden brown.
